about.name: Eduardo Josue
about.bio: Full Stack Developer passionate about building digital products with clean, accessible, and high-performance experiences.

hotel-fiesta.description: Clone of the Fiesta Hotel, includes the front-end, with a responsive design and a fluid user experience, cloned pages: home and the modal for rooms.

pro-salud.description: Clone of the Pro Salud website, includes the front-end, with a responsive design and a fluid user experience, cloned pages: home, services, contact, and jobs. Note: /jobs is not displayed because the backend service is not available in the cloud.

tico-gym.description: Personal project of a gym, for the management of clients, trainers, and training routines. Includes the front-end and back-end, with a responsive design and a fluid user experience.
